content: To see a genesis unit this early
Wtf man
Gmurphy this early
thoughts?
I genuinely don't know what he is doing with gmurphy jenkin
Unless he was testing
Arithmetica cost might be too much
Tulu is 4 cost + 5 cost alone
Mouchette SSR wheel is 4 cost
Data is flesh is 3 cost
You don't have many ways to regen arithmetica in your team
slaughter is mostly for hand cycling, and I use the tulu mostly for back to back para
I know but you have to understand this team doesn't properly snipe until like turn 6
They can only apply small debuff each turns
True, it mostly applies pressure and survives for a shocking amount of time
And if yoy face hameln gmurphy or helot gmurphy you're screwed
If you really want to survive then use stagnation
I think I've beaten a few teams with helot, gmurphy and others
Don't expect low elo to be like high elo
True
High elo shuffle their deck turn 3 and nuke
again, fair
Low elo don't know what they are doing and saw the meta team
been having too much fun annoying people with it
So they copy paste not knowing the combo
Play stagnation
Fair, and tbh, I normally just throw my own teams together
metaslaving is so boring
That's why i constantly shit on traphase
I mean, meta is still meta, even in the pve side of the game
Meta be meta
anyone having issues with draft today? Second game in a row where the lobby just freezes after the initial countdown
Played like 13 matches, didn't encounter such issue
Yeah having same issue with draft seems broken
yeah def broken, came back to try again and the same issue with another 2 games

<@226944773410258946> been loving your otk deck with some modification kekw
Oh no, not another OTK deck
Craux became a filthy meta slave too
show the team
still on 100% wr rn
Everytime I see doresain I want to die inside
How high you went with this team for now?
lmfao wym by how high
12 winstreak rn
<:idk:1356084138280489080> doresain is pretty op in traphase compared to normal gameplay where he struggle
oh
currently on 2.8k

I'm aware. Exactly why I want to die inside. One guy had him with tawil and others and I died before I could do anything. Somehow I won against him once against a human player and that was my badge of honour
Maybe some people will be there to counter your team with void posse later on
tbh anyone with tinct comp should be able to give a good fight
but no one is running tinct
Not really, stagnation AoE from 3 cost can help but not that much since sacrifice debuff cannot be cleansed anyway
wait sacrifice cant be cleansed?
It's either void them or one shot them first
Or you get fked
Yep
huh yeah, just read it. thats weird
That's why i've been complaining non stop since gmurphy revert nerf
Imagine helot gmurphy or hameln gmurphy stacking 70 sacrifice stacks on you turn 3
Or even more
And you can't do shit
I showed <@330867601691639809> the team strat with helot gmurphy and he rarely play traphase
He managed to climb really fast
Turn 3 one shot almost every times
And when the opponent used the gramona posse to rewind from previous state, it doesn't do shit

yeah i also went "100% winrate" (granted i got lucky in 2 mirrors) to 3.2k ranking on traphase and quit until it's all changed again. i consider myself to be very bad at traphase but it's not relevant when the balance is this poor
anyone can do it if you can avoid feeling stinky
easiest 3k than back then when i used helot liz to climb
Because helot liz needed 4 turn or 5 if unlucky
This gmurphy is 3 turns most of the times
From rain's screenshot btw
See that shit state of traphase?
yeah it has to be an extremely bad deck order to get delayed 1 turn, even then you just t pose and wait
100 sacrifice turn 3
You can't dispel sacrifice
the hameln thais gmurphy version can't even be stopped with stagnation usually since you only 100% need to play 2 cards
tbh i dont really like helot paired with gmurph, it delays the kill for 1 turn, so there's a chance for the enemy to counter and win the game
i agree actually

but it's kind of irrelevant when it's like
top: gmurphy otk teams and you can debate which one is best
then basically everything else gets shoved below
Btw idk if you saw the patch note about traphase before but now the void posse is kinda mandatory
Void posse disable 100% of alienus gain
It's not 50%
So you use it first
And combo
so basically pre-nerf void
I'm tempted to run pandia now
Just to void them and lotan laugh at them
k first lose
thats enough game for today
time for sleep
lmao
Magic hat counter
Good night
when you bring gun cry to counter magic hat but 5 times in a row my opponent always has taunt the turn they put it on
I swap back to void cause this meta sucks
Has Jenkins always been this strong? She fucking hurts
She is strong
However if you get stagnation
Her entire kit brick
guys how do i rouse in this?
i've seen other players use rouse cards but i don't know how it works
Ooh okay
